textContent: Pagod omgggg. Paunahan ulit tapos I chose not to walk really fast this round kasi ayokong mamatay yung binti ko. Had fun talking with Adam and Kiara this day. Nung una mejo nao-awkward ako kay Adam kasi sya lang di ko masyado close sa group nila Zeph pero okay naman pala sya. Oks lang naman yun tho kasi we finished quick! Sayang nga lang di pa kami umabot sa Top 5, Top 6 lang kami 💀💀💀
title: Jun 1
textContentHtml: Pagod omgggg. Paunahan ulit tapos I chose not to walk really fast this round kasi ayokong mamatay yung binti ko. Had fun talking with Adam and Kiara this day.
